title: Whisperleaf Trees
description: Whisperleaf Trees adds four new, real-world inspired tree species to Minecraft: Poplar, Willow, Alder, and Aspen. Each tree brings new wood types, planks, and saplings, blending naturally into the world while enhancing its visual diversity.
body:
**Whisperleaf Trees** introduces a set of realistic, handcrafted trees designed to seamlessly fit into the vanilla Minecraft aesthetic. All trees are based on real species, ensuring authenticity in appearance and color.

![Mod Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ad3ab35813bcda1ece7baefd62d8fbff0013451.png)

[![Ko-fi link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd32bda2dbe27a0b4100056a8e7f54e83e98f7fc.png)](https://ko-fi.com/almiris) [![Patreon link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e95a1a4d85b20de6b1f942286f9b43793d1c6dc.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/Almiris)

## Included Trees:

### Poplar
Tall and elegant, found in Forest biome.

![Poplar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b512b02174da0735679fa9dbc5ecf99816dddf_0.webp)

### Willow
Graceful, draping leaves, appearing near Rivers, Oceans, and in Swamps.

![Willow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b2c20f3f6341390ae4c919bea7dcad4f0152985_0.webp)

### Alder
Medium-sized tree with rich foliage, growing in Flower Forest biome.

![Alder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bde85f0d173a976fed0b40d34897bfa1dd4f6d1_0.webp)

### Aspen
Light-barked trees with fluttering leaves, common in Forest biome.

![Aspen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ced76720f382adcc96f768c8359d7af2338b5bac_0.webp)

## Features:

- Full woodsets for each tree.
- Naturally generated trees that complement the vanilla biome palette.
- Designed with minimalism and immersion in mind — no new biomes or mobs, just authentic trees.

Whether you want to enhance the atmosphere of your survival world or add subtle variety to creative builds, Whisperleaf Trees offers a balanced, lore-friendly way to expand Minecraft’s natural beauty.
